headline: Compass Connections, A21, Clear Channel Outdoor and Union Pacific Launch Anti-Human Trafficking Billboard Campaign
summary: Clear Channel Outdoor (NYSE: CCO) today announced its partnership with A21, an international leader in the fight against human trafficking, Compass Connections, the new operator of the National Human Trafficking Hotline, and Union Pacific Railroad, North America's premier freight railroad, to promote a nationwide digital out-of-home (OOH) campaign to combat human trafficking. Launched in June, the billboard campaign "Can You See Me?" educates the public on the true scale and diverse victims impa
